desc.id: 21 perguruan tinggi Yogyakarta berkolaborasi menghasilkan puluhan ribu lulusan per tahun. Penyuplai utama talenta engineer untuk industri teknologi nasional.
desc.en: 21 Yogyakarta universities collaborate to produce tens of thousands of graduates annually. The main supplier of engineering talent for the national tech industry.

desc.id: Jalur ekosistem yang menampung ratusan startup aktif, membentang dari studio game indie kelas dunia hingga perusahaan SaaS B2B berskala enterprise.
desc.en: An ecosystem corridor hosting hundreds of active startups, ranging from world-class indie game studios to enterprise-scale B2B SaaS companies.

desc.id: Pusat inkubasi kolaborasi NUS Enterprise yang menghubungkan inovator lokal dengan pasar global. Didukung lebih dari 200 event tech komunitas per tahun.
desc.en: An incubation hub collaborating with NUS Enterprise, connecting local innovators with global markets. Supported by over 200 tech community events per year.

desc.id: Cetak biru digitalisasi layanan publik, integrasi sensor IoT mitigasi bencana Merapi, dan manajemen data presisi untuk tata kelola wilayah.
desc.en: A blueprint for public service digitalization, integration of Merapi disaster mitigation IoT sensors, and precision data management for regional governance.

desc.id: Transformasi spasial kawasan selatan menjadi distrik hybrid: butik desainer lokal, studio animasi internasional, dan co-working space 24 jam.
desc.en: Spatial transformation of the southern area into a hybrid district: local designer boutiques, international animation studios, and 24-hour co-working spaces.

desc.id: Markas bagi raksasa industri seperti Gameloft dan ratusan studio indie. Memproduksi IP global, dari game mobile hingga film animasi pemenang penghargaan.
desc.en: Headquarters for industry giants like Gameloft and hundreds of indie studios. Producing global IPs, from mobile games to award-winning animated films.
